ui.hero_eyebrow: ✦ Umkhiqizi Othembekile Wokuhlunga Amanzi Kusukela ngo-1998
ui.hero_desc: Sikhethekile ekukhiqizeni i-PP, Carbon Block, GAC, T33, RO membranes, kanye nama-water dispenser. Siqinisekiswe yi-NSF · ISO · CE · Halal. Ozakwethu be-OEM/ODM emazweni angu-50+.
ui.about_title: Iminyaka engu-20+ Yokusebenza Kahle Kokuhlunga Amanzi
ui.about_desc: I-Eco Express Water yibhizinisi lobuchwepheshe obusezingeni eliphezulu lokuvikela imvelo elikhethekile ngezinto zokuhlunga kanye nemishini yokuhlunga yokuhlanza amanzi. Isungulwe ngo-1998, imikhiqizo yethu ihlanganisa yonke inqubo kusukela ocwaningweni nasekuthuthukisweni, ekukhiqizeni, ekukhangiseni kuya osekelweni lwezobuchwepheshe. Inkampani yethu itholakala e-Yuanhua Town, eHaining City, esiFundazweni saseZhejiang. Sinethimba lochwepheshe bezobuchwepheshe bezinga lokuqala, isikhungo sokuhlola esihlanganisiwe, kanye nesikhungo sokukhiqiza esikhulu. Singabahlinzeki abaqinisekisiwe bezihlungi zamanzi ze-halal, sinakekela izidingo nezimfuno ezihlukile zabathengi abangamaSulumane eMalaysia, e-Indonesia, nakwamanye amazwe amaSulumane.
ui.about_feat_1: Isungulwe ngo-1998 – Ngaphezu kwamashumi amabili eminyaka yobuchwepheshe bokukhiqiza
ui.about_feat_2: Ukuhlanganiswa okuqondile: i-R&D, Ukukhiqiza, i-QC, iLogistics
ui.about_feat_3: Izinhlelo zokukhiqiza eziqinisekiswe yi-NSF, ISO, CE, kanye ne-Halal
ui.about_feat_4: Isevisi ye-OEM/ODM yemikhiqizo yomhlaba wonke emazweni angu-50+
ui.about_feat_5: Itholakala e-Haining, Zhejiang – Isizinda sokuhlunga amanzi saseShayina
ui.why_desc: Kusukela ezintweni zokusetshenziswa kuya ekuhlolweni kokugcina, yonke imikhiqizo idlula ohlelweni lwethu oluqinile lokulawula ikhwalithi.
ui.why_card1_desc: Izitifiketi ze-NSF / ISO / CE / Halal ezisekelwa yiyo yonke iqoqo esilikhiqizayo.
ui.why_card2_desc: Ukufakwa kwebhrendi ngokwezifiso, ukupakishwa, kanye nemininingwane yomkhiqizo ukuze ihambisane nemakethe yakho.
ui.why_card3_desc: Izinhlelo zokukhiqiza ezi-4 ezizinikele ezihlanganisa i-PP, Carbon, Quick-connect, kanye ne-Leak Test.
ui.why_card4_desc: Isikhathi sokulethwa izinsuku eziyi-7–15 ngezinhlelo zokuthumela ezimisiwe emazweni angu-50+.
ui.products_desc: Amamodeli angu-42 ezigabeni ezingu-8 – kusukela kuma-inline cartridge kuya kuma-vertical dispenser kanye nezinhlelo ze-RO eziphelele.
ui.workshop_desc: Izinhlelo zokukhiqiza ezi-4 ezikhethekile: isihlungi se-PP, i-Carbon block, i-Quick-connect inline, kanye nokutholwa kokuvuza okuzenzakalelayo.
ui.exhibition_desc: Hlangana nethimba lethu e-AquaTech Shanghai kanye neminye imicimbi emikhulu yezimboni.
ui.contact_desc: Sitshele ngephrojekthi yakho. Onjiniyela bethu bokuthengisa baphendula emahoreni angama-24.
ui.contact_address: 1# Chuangxin Road, Yuanhua Town, Haining, Zhejiang Province, China
ui.footer_brand_desc: Umkhiqizi othembekile wezixazululo zokuhlunga amanzi kusukela ngo-1998. I-PP, Carbon Block, GAC, T33, RO membranes, kanye nama-water dispenser kozakwethu be-OEM/ODM bomhlaba wonke.

products.name: I-Golden Color Water Dispenser MT-900G
products.desc: I-dispenser yamanzi yasodongeni enamazinga ama-5 omthamo wamanzi (150ml–850ml) kanye namazinga ama-5 okushisa kwamanzi (25°C–100°C). Isici sokushisisa sensimbi engagqwali ye-titanium gold engu-316L. Isikhiye sokuphepha sezingane. I-premium golden glass panel.

products.name: I-White Color Water Dispenser MT-S800
products.desc: I-dispenser yamanzi yasodongeni enamandla angu-2200W. Okukhipha amanzi ashisayo ngokushesha ngemizuzwana emi-3. Amazinga ama-5 okulungiswa komthamo wamanzi nokushisa. I-white glass panel.

products.name: I-Dark Green Water Dispenser MT-600DG
products.desc: I-dispenser yamanzi yasodongeni enomklamo wesimanje oshelelayo ngombala oyingqayizivele oluhlaza okotshani okumnyama. Igcina indawo yaphansi futhi inikeza amanzi ahlanzekile aqhubekayo.

products.name: I-Black Color Water Dispenser MT-B600
products.desc: I-dispenser yamanzi yasodongeni enamandla angu-2200W nokushisisa ngokushesha kwemizuzwana emi-3. I-glass panel egcwele enezingxenye zeplastiki ze-matte spray.

products.name: I-Wall Mounted Water Dispenser MT-E600
products.desc: I-dispenser yamanzi yasodongeni enemibala emibili emnyama nemhlophe. I-compact, yonga amandla, inamazinga amaningi okukhipha amanzi.

products.name: I-1000W Vertical Water Dispenser MT-DV-E600
products.desc: I-dispenser yamanzi eqondile enamandla amakhulu enethangi lensimbi engagqwali engu-304 namandla okushisisa angu-1KW. Isikrini se-LED digital.

products.name: I-Vertical Water Dispenser MT-V-E300A
products.desc: I-dispenser yamanzi eqondile emira phansi enethangi lamanzi lensimbi engagqwali engu-304 nezinketho eziningi zokuphuma kwamanzi. Umklamo we-Black/White.

products.name: I-Under-Sink Reverse Osmosis Water Filter
products.desc: Isistimu ye-RO esebenza ngokucindezela kwamanzi angenayo ukuze iphushe amanzi nge-membrane ye-RO. Izigaba eziningi: isihlungi se-sediment, isihlungi se-carbon, i-membrane ye-RO.

products.name: I-30-inch Three Stage Big Blue Water Filter
products.desc: Ukuhlunga kwezigaba ezintathu: isihlungi se-PP (izinhlayiya ezinkulu), i-membrane ye-RO (izinsimbi ezisindayo, amagciwane, amavirusi), i-CTO Carbon Block (i-chlorine, ukunambitheka).

products.name: I-Three Stage Plus UV Water Purifier
products.desc: Isistimu yokuhlanza amanzi yezigaba ezintathu ethuthukiswe ngokubulala amagciwane nge-UV ukuze kuphephe amanzi okuphakeme.

products.name: I-Medium Size Water Filter w/ Copper Connector
products.desc: I-cartridge yesihlungi samanzi yosayizi omaphakathi enesixhumi sethusi sokufakwa okuqinile nokusebenza.

products.name: I-Eco Express Water Housing Filter
products.desc: Isihlungi se-carbon block sisebenzisa i-carbon esebenzayo ecindezelwe yaba yibhlokhi. Isusa i-chlorine, ama-chloramine, ama-pesticide, nephunga.

products.name: I-Carbon Block Filter (Coconut Shell)
products.desc: I-carbon esebenzayo yegobolondo likakhukhunathi enenani eliphakeme le-iodine (1000) yokuhlanza ngempumelelo. Ubude bama-intshi ayi-10, ububanzi bangaphandle obungama-intshi ayi-2.5.

products.name: I-PP Spun Sediment Filter
products.desc: Izintambo ezincane ze-polypropylene ezimsulwa ezingu-100%. Isusa ukugqwala, udaka, isikali, i-sediment, ukungcola. Itholakala ngama-intshi ayi-10/20/30/40.

products.name: I-UDF Granular Activated Carbon Filter
products.desc: Isihlungi se-GAC esijwayelekile sama-intshi ayi-10 esivela ku-carbon enenani eliphakeme le-iodine. Inciphisa i-chlorine, amakhemikhali e-organic, ukunambitheka nephunga okungelona okwemvelo.

products.name: I-Ceramic Filter Cartridge
products.desc: I-cartridge yesihlungi se-ceramic yekhwalithi ephezulu yokususa izinhlayiya ezinhle namagciwane.

products.name: I-Ion-Exchange Resin Filter
products.desc: I-ion-exchange resin cartridge yokuthambisa amanzi nokususa izinsimbi ezisindayo.

products.name: I-Ultrafiltration (UF) Cartridge
products.desc: I-hollow-fiber ultrafiltration membrane cartridge yokususa amagciwane, amavirusi, nezinto ze-colloidal.

products.name: I-Maifan Stone Inline Filter
products.desc: Isihlungi se-inline esiqukethe amatshe e-Maifan ukuze kunezelwe amaminerali emanzini futhi kuthuthukiswe ukunambitheka.

products.name: I-Inline Mineral Filter
products.desc: Ingeza amaminerali abalulekile emuva emanzini ahlanzekile ukuze kuthuthukiswe izinzuzo zezempilo nokunambitheka.

products.name: I-RO Membrane Filter Cartridge
products.desc: I-reverse osmosis membrane cartridge — ingxenye eyinhloko yezinhlelo ze-RO yokukhipha usawoti nokuhlanza.

products.name: I-Multi-Stage Filter Cartridge Combination
products.desc: Inhlanganisela yama-filter cartridge ahlukahlukene aklanyelwe ukuhlanzwa kwezigaba eziningi.

products.name: I-Post T33 Inline Carbon Filter
products.desc: Isihlungi se-carbon se-inline sangemuva kokuhlunga sokunambitheka kwamanzi nokususa nephunga elisalayo.

products.name: I-Inline PP Cartridge
products.desc: Isihlungi se-sediment se-polypropylene se-inline sezinhlelo zokuhlanza amanzi ezihlangene.

products.name: I-PPF Polypropylene Fiber Cartridge
products.desc: Isihlungi se-polypropylene fiber cartridge sokususa i-sediment.

products.name: I-Pre-UDF Activated Carbon Cartridge
products.desc: I-granular activated carbon cartridge yokuhlunga kwangaphambili ukuze kuvikelwe ama-membrane angezansi.

products.name: I-T33 Post Filter Cartridge
products.desc: Isihlungi se-carbon sangemuva sekhwalithi ephezulu sokuhlanzwa kwesigaba sokugcina.

products.name: I-Ultra Film Filter Cartridge
products.desc: I-cartridge ye-film ye-ultrafiltration ethuthukisiwe yokuhlunga okunokusebenza okuphezulu.

products.name: I-UF Hollow Fiber Filter
products.desc: I-ultrafiltration cartridge yokususa izinto eziqinile ezimisiwe kahle.

products.name: I-Industrial PP Filter (SOE/DOE)
products.desc: Isihlungi se-PP melt-blown sezinga lezimboni, sitholakala ekucushweni kwe-SOE (Single Open End) ne-DOE (Double Open End).

products.name: I-PP Filter with Fin End Cap
products.desc: I-cartridge ye-PP yezimboni enekepisi lokugcina lesitayela se-fin ukuze ihlale ngokuphephile, ngaphandle kokuvuza emayunithi ezindlu.

products.name: I-PP Filter with Silicon Ring
products.desc: I-cartridge yesihlungi se-PP efakwe iringi yokubopha ye-silicon yezinga lokudla yokubopha okuthembeke kakhulu.

products.name: I-Industrial Carbon Block Filter
products.desc: Isihlungi se-carbon block esisebenzayo sezinga lezimboni sezinhlelo zokumuncwa kwamakhemikhali ogeleza kakhulu.

products.name: I-Compressed Activated Carbon Block
products.desc: Ibhulokhi ye-carbon ecindezelwe kakhulu yokususa i-chlorine ne-VOC okuphakeme.

products.name: I-Mineralized Small T33 Inline Water Filter
products.desc: Ithuthukisa ukunambitheka nephunga ngokususa i-chlorine nokwengeza amaminerali anenzuzo emanzini ukuze kuthuthukiswe impilo nokufakwa kwamanzi emzimbeni.

products.name: I-Small Molecule Antibacterial Mineralization Filter
products.desc: Ukuhlunga okuthuthukisiwe okususa amagciwane ayingozi namavirusi ngenkathi kwengeza amaminerali anenzuzo emanzini.

products.name: I-Antibacterial Mineralization Filter Cartridge
products.desc: Isusa ngempumelelo amagciwane ayingozi namavirusi futhi yengeza amaminerali anenzuzo.

products.name: I-Inline Cation Resin Filter Cartridge
products.desc: Ithambisa amanzi ngokususa amaminerali aqinile njenge-calcium ne-magnesium, inciphisa ukunqwabelana kwesikali ezimpahleni.

products.name: I-T33 Coconut Shell Carbon Inline Filter
products.desc: I-post-filter T33 inline cartridge ene-premium coconut shell activated carbon yokunambitheka.

products.name: I-400GPD High Flow RO Membrane
products.desc: I-membrane ye-reverse osmosis yomthamo ophezulu yokuhlanzwa kwamanzi ekhaya nawentengiso encane.

products.name: I-Maifan Stone Mineralizing Purifier
products.desc: I-purifier yezigaba eziningi enetshana le-Maifan lokufaka amaminerali nokuthuthukisa ikhwalithi yamanzi.

products.name: I-Alkaline Water Purifier System
products.desc: Ikhiqiza amanzi e-alkaline ngokukhulisa amazinga e-pH nokwengeza amaminerali abalulekile.
